message:
Add ensemble output cache and loader tests (86.0% → 87.2%)

Output cache: 17 tests for NewModeOutputCacheWithDir, defaultDir,
loggerSafe, Clear, Stats, Lookup/Put/Invalidate nil-safety,
ModeOutputConfig.Hash, Fingerprint.CacheKey, BuildFingerprint edge
cases, DefaultCacheConfig. Loader: 6 tests for LoadEnsemblesFile
(valid/missing/invalid/empty), SaveEnsemblesFile, round-trip.

Key improvements: Clear 0%→83%, Stats 0%→80%, defaultDir 0%→100%,
loggerSafe 0%→67%, LoadEnsemblesFile 0%→100%, SaveEnsemblesFile 0%→100%.

Ref: bd-zx5f0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
